creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
I think @bris.ac.uk and @bristol.ac.uk are both
working. I can receive email sent to either domain.
It's just easier to have all my ports have the
same email, for things like distfile availability, etc.

So, yes, mexas@bris.ac.uk and mexas@bristol.ac.uk 
are both working. I'm just not sure which is the
main and which is the alias.

Anton
